business.name: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving

hero.subheadline: Family-owned and operated for over 30 years. Wet hire, excavation, land clearing, roads and dams — we have the right machine for every job.

services.headline: What We Do
services.subheadline: A full range of earthmoving and civil services for agricultural, commercial, industrial and residential projects across the Hunter Valley.

items.title: Earthmoving & Rehabilitation
items.description: Comprehensive earthmoving and site rehabilitation tailored to your project — from initial cut and fill through to finished landform.

page.heroSub: Experienced operators and a capable fleet delivering earthworks that last.
page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has been delivering bulk earthworks and rehabilitation projects across the Hunter Valley for over 30 years. Our experienced operators and diverse fleet ensure the right machine is matched to every task — from large-scale cut and fill to detailed finishing work.

items.question: What areas do you service?
items.answer: We service Cessnock, Maitland, the Upper Hunter and surrounding regions.

items.question: Do you offer contract and hourly rates?
items.answer: Yes — we offer both contract and hourly rates depending on your project requirements.

items.question: What size excavators do you have available?
items.answer: We have 4.5t, 13t and 20t excavators available for wet hire.

items.question: Are operators included with the hire?
items.answer: Yes — all machinery is offered as wet hire, meaning experienced operators are included.

items.title: Roads & Dams Construction
items.description: Experienced construction of rural roads, access tracks and farm dams built to last in the Hunter Valley's demanding conditions.

page.heroSub: Durable rural infrastructure built right — roads and dams that perform for decades.
page.intro: From farm access tracks to irrigation dams, Mitchell Bros has the equipment and expertise to construct rural infrastructure that performs in the Hunter's conditions. We've built hundreds of kilometres of roads and dozens of dams across the region.

highlights.text: Farm dams and irrigation water storage

items.question: Do you construct irrigation and farm dams?
items.answer: Yes — we construct farm dams for irrigation, stock water and general storage across the Hunter region.

items.question: What equipment do you use for road construction?
items.answer: Typically a combination of dozer, grader, excavator and compaction equipment depending on the scope.

items.question: Can you service remote rural properties?
items.answer: Yes — we have low loaders and transport capability to reach properties throughout the Upper Hunter.

items.question: Do I need council approval for a farm dam?
items.answer: Approval requirements vary. We can advise based on your specific situation and property.

items.title: Land Clearing
items.description: Efficient land clearing for development, agriculture or rehabilitation — trees, scrub, stumps and debris removed cleanly and quickly.

page.heroSub: Fast, thorough land clearing for agriculture, development and rehabilitation.
page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving provides land clearing services across the Hunter Valley for farming, development and rehabilitation purposes. Our dozer, stick rake and wheel loader combinations clear scrub, trees and debris efficiently, leaving your land ready for its next purpose.

highlights.text: Windrow and pile for burning or disposal

items.question: Do I need approval to clear my land?
items.answer: Native vegetation clearing may require approval. We recommend checking with your local council before proceeding.

items.question: What happens to the cleared material?
items.answer: We can windrow, pile or spread material depending on your preference and intended land use.

items.question: Can you clear rocky or steep terrain?
items.answer: Yes — our dozer and excavator fleet handles challenging terrain effectively.

items.question: Do you service Upper Hunter properties?
items.answer: Yes — we regularly work throughout the Upper Hunter region.

cta.headline: Ready to Clear Your Land?
cta.subheadline: Get in touch for a free site visit and quote.

items.title: Erosion Control & Silt Fencing
items.description: Protect your site and waterways with professional erosion control measures — silt fencing, batters, and drainage solutions installed correctly.

page.heroSub: Protect your site, comply with regulations, and prevent costly erosion damage.
page.intro: Erosion control is a critical part of any earthworks or development project. Mitchell Bros provides practical, effective erosion management — from silt fence installation to batter shaping and drainage works — helping you stay compliant and protecting your site investment.

steps.title: Site Assessment
steps.description: We review drainage patterns, risk areas and regulatory requirements.

steps.title: Plan & Quote
steps.description: Recommended measures with clear pricing.

steps.title: Installation
steps.description: Erosion controls installed correctly and to specification.

steps.title: Monitoring
steps.description: We can return to inspect and maintain controls over the project duration.

items.question: Is erosion control required on my project?
items.answer: Most development and construction sites are required to implement erosion and sediment controls. We can advise based on your project type.

items.question: Do you install silt fencing?
items.answer: Yes — silt fencing installation is one of our core erosion control services.

items.question: Can you help with mining site erosion control?
items.answer: Yes — we have extensive experience working on mining sites in the Hunter Valley.

items.question: How quickly can you mobilise?
items.answer: We work Monday to Friday year-round and can typically mobilise within a few days for erosion control works.

cta.headline: Need Erosion Control on Your Site?
cta.subheadline: Get in touch for a site assessment and quote.

about.headline: About Mitchell Bros Earthmoving
about.body:
Mitchell Bros Earthmoving (MBE) is a family-owned and operated business that has been serving the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions for over 30 years. We work across the agricultural, commercial, construction, industrial, mining and residential sectors — bringing the right machine and the right operator to every job.

Our fleet is available for wet hire Monday to Friday, all year round. Whether you need a machine for a day or a crew for a long-term contract, you'll deal with a professional and experienced team that takes pride in getting the job done properly.

highlights.text: Family-owned and operated — over 30 years in the Hunter Valley
Full fleet wet hire available Monday to Friday
Contract and hourly rates to suit your project
Agricultural, commercial, mining and residential experience

aboutPage.heroSub: A family business built on hard work, local knowledge, and over 30 years of Hunter Valley earthmoving.

mission.headline: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide professional, reliable earthmoving services that get projects done on time and to specification — backed by experienced operators, a capable fleet, and three decades of local knowledge.

story.headline: Our Story
paragraphs: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has been a fixture in the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions for over 30 years. What started as a family operation has grown into one of the region's most trusted earthmoving businesses — but the family-owned ethos has never changed.

We've worked across every industry that drives the Hunter economy: agriculture, mining, construction, commercial development and residential. That breadth of experience means we understand the specific demands and conditions of local projects in a way that outside contractors simply can't match.

Today, our extensive fleet and experienced operators are available for wet hire Monday to Friday, all year round. Whether you're a farmer building a dam, a developer preparing a site, or a mining operation needing rehabilitation works, you'll get the same professional service that has kept clients coming back for decades.

items.title: Local Knowledge
items.description: Over 30 years working in the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions. We know the terrain, the conditions and the people.

items.title: Right Machine, Right Job
items.description: Our extensive fleet means we always have the right equipment available — and our operators know exactly how to use it.

items.title: Family Values
items.description: We're a family business and we treat our clients like one. No corporate runaround — just straight talk and quality work.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: When we commit to a job, we show up. Our operators are available Monday to Friday, all year round.
